title: Gethzerion

{{Quote|Do you know how many bones are in the human body, General Solo? If you do, just triple the number, and you'll know how many bones you'll have when I finish with you.|Gethzerion, to Han Solo|<ref name="CoPL" />}}
'''Gethzerion''' was the founder and leader of the [[Nightsisters/Legends|Nightsisters]] from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Dathomir/Legends|Dathomir]]. She was the daughter of Clan Mother [[Augwynne Djo]] and sister of [[Barukka]], [[Kara'Teel]] and [[Allaya Djo]]. A ruthless and tyrannical matriarch, Gethzerion ruled the Nightsisters with an iron fist and terrorized the other Dathomiri for years.

==Biography==
===Early life===
{{Quote|Gethzerion is powerful because we of the clans have not challenged her for far too long. When she began following her dark ways, we could have put an end to her easily.|Tannath|<ref name="CoPL" />}}
[[File:ClanMotherGethzerion-GH.jpg|thumb|left|180px|Clan Mother Gethzerion]]
[[Reproduction/Legends|Born]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Dathomir/Legends|Dathomir]] decades before the start of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], Gethzerion belonged to the [[Witches of Dathomir|Daughters of Allya]], a society of [[The Force/Legends|Force]]-[[Force-sensitive/Legends|sensitive]] [[Gender/Legends|females]] who used "[[Magic/Legends|magic]]" to control the Force, with the [[Maleling|male population]] serving as servants and mates. Her [[Parent/Legends|mother]] was none other than [[Augwynne Djo]], respected [[Clan mother/Legends|matriarch]] of the [[Singing Mountain Clan]].<ref name="CTD" /> Unlike her mother, who was a full-[[Blood/Legends|blooded]] [[Human/Legends|Human]],<ref name="CoPL" /> Gethzerion belonged to the [[Dathomirian/Legends|Dathomirian]] species,<ref name="ERC" /> which resulted from the [[Hybrid/Legends|hybridization]] of Humans and [[Zabrak/Legends|Zabraks]].<ref name="BoSSotDS">''[[Book of Sith: Secrets from the Dark Side]]''</ref>

One of four sisters, Gethzerion was by far the most talented with the channeling of the Force. During her formative [[Standard year/Legends|years]], she realized that she could use the Force without the ritual chantings prescribed by her people's customs and traditions, a feat only Mother Augwynne and Clan Protector [[Tannath]] had achieved until then. Because of such exceptional skills, Gethzerion was openly adored not only by her younger siblings, [[Allaya Djo|Allaya]] and [[Kara'Teel]], but also by her older sister [[Barukka]].<ref name="CTD" />

===The Nightsisters===
{{Quote|I believe the Emperor himself was afraid of the Nightsisters. That's why he interdicted this planet. Years ago, he started a nice little penal colony here, not knowing about the Nightsisters. When he learned about them, he blew the planet's airfield from orbit and stranded hundreds of his own people here, along with the prisoners, rather than risk letting Gethzerion escape. That's how frightened he was of Gethzerion.|[[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]], to [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]]|<ref name="CoPL" />}}
Traditionally, those who broke their laws and codes were exiled to live out their lives in the wilderness in solitude and contemplation. Some of those clans who were devoted to the dark side were known as [[Nightsisters/Legends|Nightsisters]]. However, at some point during the waning days of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], Gethzerion and another sister named [[Baritha]] were exiled after attempting to assassinate Mother Augwynne. The two exiles began to gather together other outcasts to form their own clan, which eventually became the Nightsisters.

The Nightsisters did not fear the dark powers forbidden by the ancients, but reveled in them and raised their daughters in the dark side, although they did not understand it as the Jedi did. During the reign of Gethzerion, many of the [[Witches of Dathomir|Dathomiri]] were killed or captured by her clan, which grew ever more powerful and was aided by the other Witches' indecision in dealing with them.

At some point Gethzerion noted that a fellow Nightsister [[Kyrisa]] had showed exceptional promise in her ability to control the beasts of Dathomir.<ref name="Card-SWGTCG-The Weak Mind Is Controlled">{{SWGTCG|set=The Nightsister's Revenge|cardname=The Weak Mind Is Controlled}}</ref> However, Kyrisa became so convinced in her own superiority, that she choose to directly confront Gethzerion in combat. During the fierce clash for leadership, Kyrisa openly declared her intent to slay the Clan Mother and to take her place as the leader of the Nightsisters.<ref name="Card-SWGTCG-Fateful Encounter">{{SWGTCG|set=The Nightsister's Revenge|cardname=Fateful Encounter}}</ref> However, her challenge of Gethzerion failed and for her attempt Gethzerion banished Kyrisa not only from the Nightsisters, but from the planet itself.<ref name="Card-SWGTCG-Gone Forever">{{SWGTCG|set=The Nightsister's Revenge|cardname=Gone Forever}}</ref>

[[File:Fateful_Encounter.jpg|thumb|Gethzerion is confronted by Kyrisa.]]
While the Nightsisters believed that they had to perform rituals to unleash their Force powers, only Gethzerion realized the true power that she could control. [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] knew of her power while he was alive and ordered that she be kept trapped on Dathomir where she could still rule but not use her power elsewhere. [[Zsinj]], who would later become a ruling Imperial [[Warlord/Legends|warlord]], was assigned to keep an eye on Dathomir.

When [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] crash-landed the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']] on Dathomir, Gethzerion was contacted by Zsinj and the two of them managed to capture Han Solo and [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]].

Gethzerion finally met her match in [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and [[Teneniel Djo]] (a Dathomiri from Gethzerion's former clan and her niece) when they turned up to rescue their friends. Gethzerion fled in a space carrier but was killed when two of [[Zsinj]]'s Star Destroyers opened fire under his orders. With the ship's destruction along with its occupant, the Dathomirians were free of Gethzerion's tyranny.

==Powers and abilities==
Gethzerion was extremely powerful in the Force, to the point that even [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]], a [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord of the Sith]], was wary of her, stranding her on [[Dathomir/Legends|Dathomir]] and allowing no ships to land in an effort to isolate her. She was able to generate weather-based [[Force storm (weather)|Force storms]] merely through anger, had very advanced [[Telekinesis/Legends|telekinetic]] abilities, killed General [[Melvar]] along with 100 [[Stormtrooper/Legends|Stormtroopers]] effortlessly, and near-fatally injured [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] using Force Lightning. In addition she could perform [[Telepathy/Legends|Telepathy]] and had a decent ability in [[Force jump/Legends|Force Jump]] and [[Force speed/Legends|speed]] despite her advanced age. Furthermore, Gethzerion was a fierce and deadly combatant and was also one of several Nightsisters known to use a red [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]].

It was believed that at some point Gethzerion wrote the [[Book of Shadows]], containing details of the spells and rituals of her Nightsisters.

==Behind the scenes==
[[File:Gethzerion_concept_art.jpg|thumb|right|250px|Concept art for ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]''.]]
''[[The Essential Guide to Characters]]'' mistakenly lists Gethzerion as "Gethzerionb" in the title for her entry, likely a typography error, although other instances of her name are correct.

Gethzerion appeared as a [[Wikipedia:Non-player character|non-player character]] in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]],<ref name="SWG:Gethzerion" /> prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].<ref name="Shutdown">{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}}</ref> Gethzerion was one of the quest givers of the original "[[W:c:swg:Singing Mountain Clan Theme Park|Singing Mountain Clan Theme Park]]."<ref name="SWG:Gethzerion" /> This quest series was removed from the game upon the release of the revamped "[[W:c:swg:Witches of Dathomir Theme Park|Witches of Dathomir Theme Park]]," introduced in the [[W:c:swg:Game Update 19|Game Update 19]] on [[December 14]], [[2010]].<ref name="GU19">{{SonyForumsCite|url=swg/posts/list.m?topic_id=1160720|text=''Star Wars'' Galaxies: Game Update 19}}</ref> Gethzerion's original quests were totally removed as the character was included in the new questline.<ref name="SWG:AToTC">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=general|A Tale of Two Clans|Dathomir}}</ref>

While the [[1995]] guidebook ''[[The Essential Guide to Characters]]'' listed Gethzerion's species as [[Human/Legends|Human]],<ref name="EGC" /> she was [[Retroactive continuity|retconned]] into a Dathomirian following the release of ''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' in [[2012]].<ref name="ERC" />
